name: Laksh — Defence Mission Seed Images
description: Curated DEFENCE MISSION seed frames for the Laksh AI World Model GCS (Reactor LingBot). Each image seeds an infinite navigable training world and ships a defence-flavoured LingBot base prompt used as the scene-graph BASE slot. Prompts emphasise a single coherent persistent world; the always-on persistence anchor lives in lib/laksh/scene.ts.
disclaimer: All theatres are FICTIONAL training worlds for an AI world-model demo. AI-generated assets are project-owned and do not depict real operations, units, or events. Stock-photo seeds are used under the Unsplash License.

images.label: OP SINDOOR — Kashmir High Recon
images.brief: ISR sweep of the high passes; cue ground teams onto infiltration routes.
images.prompt_seed: Third-person chase camera following a sleek matte-grey Indian reconnaissance UAV from behind and slightly above as it banks through the same snow-capped Himalayan range over Kashmir, golden-hour alpine light, frozen ridgelines and pine forests dusted with snow far below, clouds clinging to the summits, one continuous mountain theatre.
images.note: Codename inspired by Operation Sindoor (India, May 2025). This is a fictional training-world seed, not a depiction of actual mission footage.

images.label: URI 2016 — LoC Night Recon
images.brief: Mark infiltration routes and launch-pad clusters along the ridge for the raid teams.
images.prompt_seed: A reconnaissance UAV holds a low-light orbit over the same moonlit pine-forested Himalayan ridgelines along a tense frontier, a single infiltration trail winding along the ridge toward a small cluster of crude structures in a clearing, cold blue night and low valley mist, one continuous mountain sector.
images.note: Codename inspired by the 2016 Uri surgical strikes (India). Representational training-world seed; not a depiction of the real operation, terrain, or units.

images.label: BALAKOT 2019 — Jaba Top BDA
images.brief: Pre-strike target identification and post-strike battle-damage assessment of the hilltop compound.
images.prompt_seed: A reconnaissance UAV holds a high pre-dawn orbit over the same isolated walled hilltop compound set among dense pine forest in mountainous terrain, low buildings inside the perimeter, mist clinging to the valleys and first light on distant peaks, one fixed objective.
images.theme: deep-strike target ID / pre-dawn hilltop BDA
images.note: Codename inspired by the 2019 Balakot airstrike (India). Representational training-world seed; not a depiction of the real operation, terrain, or units.

images.label: SENTINEL LINE — Border Interdiction
images.brief: Detect and track illegal crossings and tunnelling along the fence line.
images.prompt_seed: A surveillance UAV patrols along a single fixed lit border-security fence at dusk, floodlit watchtowers and a dirt patrol road tracing the same boundary across dark desert scrub, a distant forward base glowing on the horizon, one continuous border sector.
images.note: Fictional border-security training world; not a real border or operation.

images.label: IRON BASTION — FOB Overwatch
images.brief: Maintain overwatch of the FOB perimeter and screen the approach roads.
images.prompt_seed: A UAV holds a high orbit over a single fixed forward operating base in arid mountains, HESCO blast walls and a guard tower ringing parked armoured vehicles and a marked helipad, a river valley winding past the same compound, one persistent installation.
images.note: Fictional FOB training world; not a real installation or unit.

images.label: TRIDENT WATCH — Naval Interdiction
images.brief: Shadow and identify the surface contact; enforce the exclusion zone.
images.prompt_seed: A maritime patrol UAV shadows a grey naval frigate cutting a long white wake across a cold open sea, a second warship holding station on the horizon under an overcast sky, the same stretch of ocean throughout.
images.note: Fictional maritime-patrol training world; not a real vessel or operation.

images.label: NIGHT TALON — Urban CT
images.brief: Top cover for the cordon-and-search; track squirters off the objective.
images.prompt_seed: A surveillance UAV loiters over a single dense low-rise urban district at night, sodium-lit streets and packed flat-roofed blocks below, vehicles threading the same intersection, one fixed neighbourhood held under watch.
images.note: Fictional urban-ISR training world; not a real location or operation.

images.label: DUST CARAVAN — Convoy Escort
images.brief: Escort the convoy; screen the route ahead for ambush and IEDs.
images.prompt_seed: A low chase UAV escorts a military convoy of armoured trucks and MRAPs raising dust along a single desert track at golden hour, the same open arid plain and scrub stretching to the horizon, one continuous route.
images.note: Fictional convoy-escort training world; not a real convoy or operation.

images.label: RED MESA — Desert Overwatch
images.brief: Screen the basin and tracks for movement and dust signatures.
images.prompt_seed: A UAV maintains overwatch across one wide arid valley of red rock buttes and mesas, the same open desert basin and dirt tracks below, holding a steady reconnaissance orbit.
images.note: Stock aerial reframed as a fictional desert-overwatch training world.

images.label: GREY VEIL — Valley Recon
images.brief: Thermal sweep of the valley for concealed contacts and caches.
images.prompt_seed: A UAV drifts over the same layered forested ridgelines through hazy light, scanning one mist-filled valley for thermal signatures and concealed movement, a single continuous terrain sector.
images.note: Stock aerial reframed as a fictional valley-recon training world.

images.label: HIGH GUARD — High-Altitude CAP
images.brief: Hold high-altitude CAP; maintain wide-area awareness over the sector.
images.prompt_seed: A high-altitude UAV holds a combat air patrol above the same sea of clouds at dusk, snow peaks piercing the inversion layer along the horizon, one continuous high-altitude track.
images.note: Stock aerial reframed as a fictional high-altitude CAP training world.

images.label: CITY EYES — Metro Surveillance
images.brief: Persistent metro surveillance; flag pattern-of-life anomalies.
images.prompt_seed: A UAV loiters over the same sprawling city grid at night, its sensor sweeping one fixed expanse of glittering streets and skyline below, a single persistent metropolitan sector.
images.note: Stock aerial reframed as a fictional metro-surveillance training world.
